global.title: The OH Essentials tier includes AI agent services: information retrieval, document generation, workflow execution, and task routing.
global.content:
The Operational Hub includes an AI agent services option group available from the Essentials (free) tier:

- **Information Retrieval** — finds, compiles, and summarizes information from connected sources on request
- **Document generation** — produces structured documents from templates, data inputs, or natural language instructions
- **Data entry & form completion** — fills forms, updates records, and populates fields across connected systems
- **Workflow execution** — runs multi-step processes autonomously end-to-end based on triggers or instructions
- **Task routing & escalation** — identifies tasks outside scope and hands off to the right human or system with context
- **Reporting & Summarization** — aggregates data and produces structured reports or digests on schedule or on demand

This is strategically significant: AI agent services as a free funnel item means teams experience operational automation before paying for entity formation or contributor ops. The AI agents operate on the same Powerhouse document model infrastructure, creating a flywheel where free-tier usage demonstrates the value of the full platform.
global.description: AI-powered automation included from the free tier: doc gen, data entry, workflow execution, routing, and reporting.
